data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. While the use case mentions that appointments can auto-transfer to the nearest location with capacity, there is no concrete evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates the availability of services at specific locations. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming location-specific availability of services.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
